Localization.Description: Attempt to change a host group

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} changed host group "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
Plugin {subject.name} changed host group "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
Plugin {subject.name} failed to change host group "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} failed to change host group "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
